Entry.JapaneseText: 今度こそやったな、ゼロス！
Entry.EnglishText: You did it this time, Zelos!

Entry.JapaneseText: わりぃ、ヴェイグ。 お前のリバースを守ってやれなかった
Entry.EnglishText: Sorry, Veigue. I couldn't protect your Rebirth.
Entry.Notes: He literally says "I couldn't protect your Rebirth", as in, it's Veigue's because Veigue is the main character.

Entry.JapaneseText: いいんだ。お前のせいじゃない。 だがゼロス……本当にいいのか？
Entry.EnglishText: It's okay. It's not your fault. But Zelos... are you really okay with this?

Entry.JapaneseText: うん？ どういう事よ？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? What are you talkin' about?

Entry.JapaneseText: リバースの主役の条件は……クールだ
Entry.EnglishText: A condition for being the lead role of Rebirth is... to be cool.
Entry.Notes: He uses the loan word for "cool" here, but it's a pun.

Entry.JapaneseText: 俺さまにはクールキャラは務まらないってか？ 舐められたもんだね。 要は静かにしてりゃいいんでしょ？
Entry.EnglishText: So you're telling me I don't have what it takes to be a cool character? You underestimate me. All I really gotta do is stay quiet, right?

Entry.JapaneseText: ぶはっ！ だ、だめだ。 黙ってたら呼吸出来ない
Entry.EnglishText: Gah! N-No good. If I stay silent like that, I can't even breathe.

Entry.JapaneseText: ゼロスにしゃべるなって言うのは無理か。 こりゃ他を当たるしかないかな
Entry.EnglishText: It's not possible for you to not talk, huh. Guess all we can do is move on to the next one.
